source_pr.title: executor: avoid panic in the test
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: Not a fix for unstable tests. FYI, check [CI log](https://ci.pingcap.net/blue/rest/organizations/jenkins/pipelines/tidb_ghpr_check_2/runs/8220/nodes/62/steps/73/log/?start=0). `err` may be nil, which leads to a panic. However, I would appreciate if gocheck tell me it is nil and unexpected, instead of panic.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Problem Summary: Not a fix for unstable tests.
